/opt/emsdk/upstream/emscripten/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -sWASM=1 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=16777216 -sSTACK_SIZE=2097152 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_xcm_create,_xcm_destroy,_xcm_render,_xcm_pixels,_xcm_width,_xcm_height,_xcm_doc_height,_xcm_metrics_json,_xcm_alloc,_xcm_free -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=ccall,cwrap,UTF8ToString,stringToUTF8,HEAPU8 -sENVIRONMENT=web,worker -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=XcmRenderCore -sSINGLE_FILE=0 -O3 -msimd128 CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/html_tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/css_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/style_resolver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/paint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/render_core.dir/src/exports.cpp.o -o render_core.js
